reviews.text: Great place to come enjoy delicious food and wine. We tried different appetizers, where the highlight was the eggplant, and had some wine by the glass, they also had a great selection of wine per bottle. They had the waiter and sommelier come to the tables, which added an extra detail to it. Very nice setting as well, offering tables inside for a more quiet space and a more lively terrace. Highly recommended!

Expensive and mediocre. I came here for a TimeLeft dinner, so it was not a place I would have chosen otherwise. Since they had a few vegan options on the menu, I figured I would give it a try. I wanted the sopa de calabaza, but they were out, so I ended up with the repollo sellado. At first bite I thought I liked it, but it was very oily and didn't sit well with me. It was so extremely hot on the upper level that I left a pool of sweat behind in the chair. Apparently, their AC was out, but they neglected to tell me that when they were asking where I wanted to sit. They charge you a cubierto fee ($2700). They tell you this on the menu but in small print of course. Overall, I was not the slightest bit impressed. Save your money and go elsewhere.

I go every now and then, the service is completely knowledgeable and friendly, the food and the menu is super well thought I tried yesterday the curry chicken and it was fantastic. Then I tried the stuffed portobello’s and they were good but a smaller portion that I than I expected… but let’s be honest, I’m being nitpicky. This is one of the best places to eat some traditional for a nice new plates around. 😃
Delicious food and great service. The place is beautiful. We ordered: Provoleta, Plato detox and ñoquis dorados. Totally recommended.

What a wonderful place! They offer a very straightforward small menu with a Spanish / Argentinian inspired dishes that makes you want to try them all.
The atmosphere is amazing, the place is big and very well decorated.. even having a terrace that’s amazing (reservation encouraged!).
I was wanting to try the place for a long time, and it didn’t disappoint! Dishes are well prepared and served, the service is quite good for Argentina standards and would probably not only recommend but also go back.
